title: Goofy Scream
description: This mod adds the iconic Goofy Scream into Minecraft  to any mob (including players) falling from a high height.
body:
Every mob in Minecraft now screams like Goofy when they fall.

🪂 What Does It Do?

This mod adds a universal, goofy scream sound effect that plays once per fall whenever a living entity drops from a dangerous height.

✔ Works on ALL entities (players, mobs, animals, bosses, etc.)
✔ Screams only once per fall, not spammy
✔ Sound gets quieter as they fall away (3D audio attenuation)

🧩 Compatibility

✔ NeoForge 1.21.1
✔ Works client-side & server-side
✔ Works on multiplayer servers
✔ Fully compatible with other mods
❌ Not for Forge or Fabric (NeoForge only)

📁 Installation

Install NeoForge 1.21.1

Drop the .jar into your mods folder

Launch the game

Push a mob off a cliff. For science.

🧑‍💻 Open Source

This mod is open, simple, and designed for easy learning.
Feel free to use it in modpacks or build on top of it.

💬 Final Notes

This mod is intentionally silly.
